title: Spathodea kohautiana
taxonomy: Spathodea kohautiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is commonly known as the 'African tulip tree'. The plant is classified as a member of the order Lamiales and the family Bignoniaceae. Bignoniaceae is a family of flowering plants that includes over 800 species, many of which are native to the Americas and Africa. The classification of Spathodea kohautiana reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary history within the Bignoniaceae family.
